name: Ecomic Co., Ltd
summary: Ecomic Co., Ltd provides payroll business process outsourcing services primarily in Japan. It also offers year-end adjustments outsourcing services; inhabitant tax collection amount renewal outsourcing services; collection agency services; time and personnel systems; and other services. The company was founded in 1997 and is headquartered in Sapporo, Japan. Ecomic Co., Ltd is a subsidiary of CAREER BANK Co., Ltd.
